title: Re-evaluate TLS (and possibly HTTP) settings and defaults used in the codebase
body:
Outstanding comments from containers/image#160:

* Why are we using a `ServerDefault` `tls.Config` in a client?
* <s>Why are we applying it only to a single path, not when we override `tls.Config` for our purposes?</s>
* <s>In `tlsclientconfig.NewTransport`, the `proxyDialer` setup should happen before we create a `http.Transport`, so that we don’t need to override `tr.Dial` in a created object.</s> Irrelevant after https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1748

comments.body: @mtrmac @vrothberg What is the state of this issue. It is two years old, can we close it?

Updated the description — the second item was cleaned up.

The third one is a trivial cleanup; the first one would require actual research, it would be nice for it to eventually happen.

The third item will go away, so I’m now re-titling this to track making an opinion on TLS and HTTP
- Do we want to deviate from the standard library’s defaults at all?
- If so, how and why? And document that in the code.
Note #619 : that allows callers to deviate, but that doesn’t absolve us from needing to care about the default; it should be used very rarely.
